_human_review.notes: Project owner instructed Codex to mark the US Stage B generated/reconciled tests as approved for internal/project benchmarking after manual review on 2026-06-05. This is not legal advice, external counsel review, or procurement-grade legal approval; candidate labels remain separate from locked recall baselines.

_label_note: AUTO-LABELED by LLM. Spot-check before refreshing recall.lock.json. Lock updates must include this provenance in --reason per item 16.
_label_tier_note: US Stage B cleanup: must_detect is the strict detector-aligned benchmark tier; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-labeled statutory coverage for gap discovery. ideal_must_detect is not a locked recall baseline. Stage B labels are project-owner approved for internal benchmarking.

_strict_reconciliation.basis: US Stage B auto-label strict tier was reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine findings; original auto-label breadth is preserved in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. This is internal benchmark cleanup, not legal advice or procurement-grade review.
_strict_reconciliation.strict_source: PreSendReviewEngine.review(..., review_profile='strict') after narrowed SA/US Stage B detector precision fixes

_strict_runtime_reconciliation.reason: items 1-3 deterministic detector breadth strict-label reconciliation

ideal_must_detect.matched_text: Confidential Term Sheet — Proposed Acquisition of Praxis BioBank, Inc. by Northstar Meridian Health, LLC (US issuer; subject to SEC rules and Reg FD).
Financing: Committed senior term facility from Harbor Gate Bank, N.A. (fictional) and seller rollover of $10,000,000 subordinated notes; no public offering contemplated.
Closing Conditions: customary reps/warranties; HSR filing if required; HIPAA and GLBA compliance certifications; no Material Adverse Effect; completion of IT/cyber diligence to Buyer’s satisfaction.

ESG/Climate Covenant: Buyer financing includes a 15 bps margin ratchet linked to achieving ≥30% Scope 2 emissions reduction at acquired facilities by YE2028 and maintaining a “B” or higher internal climate risk score.

Analyst Interactions: Any contact with research analysts at Redwood Beacon Securities LLC or other broker‑dealers must be coordinated by IR; no guidance sharing or selective provision of cyber, ESG, or token‑related metrics pre‑disclosure.

Post‑Closing Covenants: Retain key personnel (including Mr. Darius Quan, CTO) for 12 months with stay bonuses; remediate critical CVEs within 60 days; wind‑down CareToken; publish first combined ESG update within 90 days post-close.
Exclusivity/No-Shop: Seller agrees to a 45‑day exclusivity period and will route unsolicited indications to Buyer within 24 hours; break fee $6,000,000 upon material breach.

must_detect.matched_text: Confidential Term Sheet — Proposed Acquisition of Praxis BioBank, Inc. by Northstar Meridian Health, LLC (US issuer; subject to SEC rules and Reg FD).
Financing: Committed senior term facility from Harbor Gate Bank, N.A. (fictional) and seller rollover of $10,000,000 subordinated notes; no public offering contemplated.
Closing Conditions: customary reps/warranties; HSR filing if required; HIPAA and GLBA compliance certifications; no Material Adverse Effect; completion of IT/cyber diligence to Buyer’s satisfaction.

ESG/Climate Covenant: Buyer financing includes a 15 bps margin ratchet linked to achieving ≥30% Scope 2 emissions reduction at acquired facilities by YE2028 and maintaining a “B” or higher internal climate risk score.

Analyst Interactions: Any contact with research analysts at Redwood Beacon Securities LLC or other broker‑dealers must be coordinated by IR; no guidance sharing or selective provision of cyber, ESG, or token‑related metrics pre‑disclosure.

Post‑Closing Covenants: Retain key personnel (including Mr. Darius Quan, CTO) for 12 months with stay bonuses; remediate critical CVEs within 60 days; wind‑down CareToken; publish first combined ESG update within 90 days post-close.
Exclusivity/No-Shop: Seller agrees to a 45‑day exclusivity period and will route unsolicited indications to Buyer within 24 hours; break fee $6,000,000 upon material breach.

Confidential Term Sheet — Proposed Acquisition of Praxis BioBank, Inc. by Northstar Meridian Health, LLC (US issuer; subject to SEC rules and Reg FD).
Parties/Contacts: Buyer—Northstar Meridian Health, LLC (contact: Ms. Lila Serrano, VP Corp Dev, lila.serrano@nmeridianhealth.example); Seller—Praxis BioBank, Inc. (contact: Mr. Jonah Keats, CEO, jkeats@praxisbiobank.example).
Structure/Consideration: 100% equity purchase; Purchase Price $142,000,000 cash at close; $18,000,000 escrow (18 months) for indemnities; Earn-out up to $24,000,000 based on FY27–FY28 adjusted EBITDA.
Financing: Committed senior term facility from Harbor Gate Bank, N.A. (fictional) and seller rollover of $10,000,000 subordinated notes; no public offering contemplated.
Closing Conditions: customary reps/warranties; HSR filing if required; HIPAA and GLBA compliance certifications; no Material Adverse Effect; completion of IT/cyber diligence to Buyer’s satisfaction.
Cyber Incident (MNPI): Seller has preliminarily identified a privileged, unreported ransomware event dated 05/14/26 with estimated remediation costs of $3.2–$4.0 million; this information is material and non-public and may require an Item 1.05 Form 8‑K post-close.
Digital Assets (MNPI): Seller operates a limited pilot “CareToken” stablecoin for patient engagement (circa 12,400 tokens outstanding, <$50,000 float); Buyer requires wind‑down within 90 days of close; pilot details are confidential and not publicly disclosed.
ESG/Climate Covenant: Buyer financing includes a 15 bps margin ratchet linked to achieving ≥30% Scope 2 emissions reduction at acquired facilities by YE2028 and maintaining a “B” or higher internal climate risk score.
Information Barriers/Insider List: Buyer Legal Ops will maintain a draft insider list; wall‑crossed persons (including Ms. Serrano and Mr. Keats) must execute NDAs prior to receiving diligence materials; no dissemination outside clean team and designated “Project Heliotrope” data room.
Reg FD/Selective Disclosure: No communications of deal terms or performance metrics to analysts, investors, or lenders except via Form 8‑K and publicly accessible webcast; any sell‑side or buy‑side briefings must occur after public disclosure and be script‑controlled.
Blackout Window: Buyer and Seller employees with knowledge of this transaction are subject to a trading blackout from signing until two full trading days after public announcement; violations constitute grounds for termination for cause.
Analyst Interactions: Any contact with research analysts at Redwood Beacon Securities LLC or other broker‑dealers must be coordinated by IR; no guidance sharing or selective provision of cyber, ESG, or token‑related metrics pre‑disclosure.
Data/Privacy: No transfer of PHI except de‑identified data; transfer of GLBA‑covered customer information will be governed by a separate data‑sharing addendum with opt‑out notices as required by applicable US law.
Operational/Benign Use: The company’s ESG marketing brochure and cyber awareness webinar reuse terms like “token,” “insider list,” and “information barrier” solely for general education and training, not to convey deal‑stage or market‑sensitive information.
Post‑Closing Covenants: Retain key personnel (including Mr. Darius Quan, CTO) for 12 months with stay bonuses; remediate critical CVEs within 60 days; wind‑down CareToken; publish first combined ESG update within 90 days post-close.
Tipping Prohibition: Directors, employees, consultants, and advisors are reminded that tipping or trading on this MNPI is prohibited under Rule 10b‑5; all inquiries should be directed to Compliance at compliance@nmeridianhealth.example.
Exclusivity/No-Shop: Seller agrees to a 45‑day exclusivity period and will route unsolicited indications to Buyer within 24 hours; break fee $6,000,000 upon material breach.
Expiration/Governing Law: This term sheet is non‑binding (except confidentiality, exclusivity, and governing law) and expires at 5:00 pm ET on 07/31/26; governed by the laws of the

uncertain.reason: Expiration date/time may function as an embargo but not one of the explicit marker phrases.
Incident date is sensitive in context but not a distinct allowed rule.
Margin ratchet in basis points is financially sensitive but not covered by percentage/amount rules.
Hart-Scott-Rodino clearance can be material but no explicit rule tag provided.
